title: Neptune’s Invitation Reaches Them
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Camie, Sanji, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Nami, Fish-Men. The core story beat is neptune’s invitation reaches them.
scene: The scene centers on neptune’s invitation reaches them, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Camie, Sanji, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Nami, Fish-Men driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: He's a superfamous designer, so he lives in this big mansion in the most upmarket area of all, Gyovalley hills.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm going to take him some clam today, so you can come along!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But he's your pet, right? Why don't you live there too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eheheh... I wouldn't really fit in in that area... besides, this area has the tastiest clams!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, what're those big straw-type things??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Those are water roads, constructed by our top bubble engineers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Both the fish and the residents use them to get around... take a look!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Ahh!! We've reached the surface!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See?! This way, we can swim even above water!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who Oooa AAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That looks like fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm?! hang on... why is there a sky and clouds all this way down in the ocean?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! Caimie!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah!! I hear female voices!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah! You guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are your friends all better now? Those drowning pirates!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You didn't come in through the entrance, did you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hello there!! You don't seem very frightening.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Illegal immigrants? How wild!! I have a thing for pirates, you know!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WhoAaaa! It's like something right out of a fairytale!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji's burst out crying!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow, he's crying even more than when he left the baratie...

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: Everyone, this is the captain, Luffy-chin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The crying one is Sanji- Chin.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I've found it!! This is all blue!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The big- nosed one is usopp- chin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh, are you sure about that, Sanji...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And the Tanuki is Chopper- Chin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm a Rein- deer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahaha!! Is something the matter? Why the sad face?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come on in!! Let's dance together among the waves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehhhhhhhhhhhhh?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see...!! Such joy as this cannot possibly exist...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today... must be the day I die...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's gone negative!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Seriously, what the heck happened to you over these past two years?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: This island is the paradise you've been dreaming of, isn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahh...! Now I'm starting to tear up, too!! Accept the happiness, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hahahah AHAH! You're pretty funny sometimes, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What on earth could be in this barrel that came floating in along with Caimie's friends?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Alcohol? treasure?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who knows..? It seems to be very tightly sealed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Should we try opening it?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: The depths; fishman district, "Noah"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy... so he has finally come this far.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Indeed...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...wh... what should we do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Boss?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: bring him here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: To me!!!

summary: Neptune’s Invitation Reaches Them. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
